description_long: This is a whimsical pair of novelty glasses featuring star-shaped lenses outlined by a thick, glossy frame. The frame is a vibrant pink color, giving the glasses a playful and eye-catching appearance. The lenses are opaque and black, providing a stark contrast to the bright frame and enhancing the star motif. The temples are straight and moderately thick, matching the frame in color and finish, and are attached at the upper outer points of the star shapes. The bridge is integrated into the frame, connecting the two stars seamlessly without any visible nose pads or additional support. These glasses are designed more for fashion or costume use than for practical vision correction or sun protection.
description: A playful pair of star-shaped glasses with a glossy pink frame and black opaque lenses, designed for novelty or costume use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold star-shaped lenses and the thick, glossy pink frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, solid pink temple and the thickness of the frame.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the symmetrical star shapes and the seamless bridge connecting the lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the consistent frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is thick and fully encircles each lens in a bold, five-pointed star shape. It is a full-rim design with smooth, rounded edges and a playful, oversized style. The temples are straight and moderately thick, attached at the upper outer points of the stars, and the bridge is seamlessly integrated into the frame.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are solid black and fully opaque, with no visible gradient, transparency, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a molded, integrated part of the frame, connecting the two star shapes directly without any separation or nose pads. It is straight and flush with the rest of the frame.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, moderately thick, and match the frame in color and finish. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments; the design is smooth and simple.
